name: E & M Computing Ltd.
summary: E & M Computing Ltd. provides cloud, information systems, and data-center technologies in Israel. It offers IT infrastructure services, including professional, big-data and analytics, hyperscale cloud, business continuity, cyber security, software, hosted IT, networking, and outsourcing services; infrastructure for large scale private clouds, compute clusters, and software- defined systems; and design, integration, and logistic services for software vendors. The company was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Ramat Gan, Israel.
